five_bucket_framing.top_level_canonical_1liner: VERDICT joins wallet behavior, forecast skill, execution quality, market-risk context, and timestamped proof into one verified wallet rating.
five_bucket_framing.lock_set_by: operator-directive 2026-05-10 mid-afternoon HKT · "it is our top position and moat"
five_bucket_framing.why_the_join_is_the_moat: Best competitor stack covers 4 of 5 buckets at most. VERDICT is the only stack that joins all five into ONE verified wallet rating with sha256 receipts at every join.

buckets.plain_english: who they are · what they trade · how often · which domains
how accurate were predictions vs the market · per domain · with sample-size guards
orderbook microstructure at trade time · slip · depth · book-crossed · maker/taker
venue reliability · UMA dispute · oracle delay · settlement timing · counterparty universe
GitHub commits + OpenTimestamps Bitcoin anchor + methodology version chain + sha256 per snapshot

five_bucket_framing.output_form: One verdict per wallet · COPY/WATCH/AVOID/INSUFFICIENT · with the 5-bucket evidence panel under it · every bucket carrying a `verified by` link to the source file.

7_forward_anchored_derived_metrics.note: Backfillers can clone the math but cannot retroactively appear in the bitcoin chain. A competitor arriving on Day 365 has 0 days of timestamped predictions. We have N (and counting).

8_polygon_settlement_attestations.name: Polygon settlement attestations
8_polygon_settlement_attestations.description: Independent Polygon RPC ground-truth confirmation of every M1 chain resolution · cross-checks Polymarket-reported timestamp against on-chain block timestamp
8_polygon_settlement_attestations.methodology: W3 v0.1 first-pass · linear-estimation block lookup · v0.2 will read ConditionalTokens reportPayouts events for full on-chain verification
8_polygon_settlement_attestations.w3_status: LIVE since 2026-05-10 (v60bf · W3 of the 4-axis base-widening)
8_polygon_settlement_attestations.m_axis: M1 strengthening · independent on-chain ground-truth · zero auth · zero $/mo
8_polygon_settlement_attestations.note: Polygon RPC is free + public + zero auth. v0.2 will read actual ConditionalTokens reportPayouts events for exact on-chain resolution timestamps.

9_counterparty_graph.name: Counterparty graph
9_counterparty_graph.description: Universe of distinct identities the cohort transacted with · cohort + external counterparties · co-fill edges · the FIRST real broadening of the base since cohort hit 241
9_counterparty_graph.w2_status: LIVE since 2026-05-10 (v60bg · W2 of the 4-axis base-widening · the REAL widening)
9_counterparty_graph.v_axis: V1 (verdict-on-watchlist · cohort-INDEPENDENT · works on any address)
9_counterparty_graph.caveat: Built from SMOKE_PREVIEW (0.22% cohort-tx coverage). Universe will expand ~100x when full on-chain backfill lands. Methodology version will bump to W2-v0.2-full at that point.
9_counterparty_graph.note: Universe will expand ~100x when full on-chain backfill replaces SMOKE_PREVIEW source. Each daily OTS anchor stamps the universe-snapshot · backfillers cannot retroactively appear in the bitcoin chain claiming "we knew this graph on day N".

10_strategy_locks.name: Strategy locks
10_strategy_locks.description: Operator-set positioning records · sha256 of canonical text + set_date + set_by · the S&P/Moody's-pattern proof discipline applied to STRATEGY (not just product metrics)
lock_names: Verified Wallet Rating · Top Position + Moat (operator-canonical)
Launch Priority Lock · Pro Trader → Creator Desk → Enterprise Pilot
Wallet Ratings Agency Reframe · Bible Deck
10_strategy_locks.m_axis: M2 (only-neutral-seat positioning lock) + M5 (versioned positioning chain)
10_strategy_locks.shipped: v60ce · 2026-05-10 (Rec 3 from public-ledger Frame 3+4 alignment audit)
10_strategy_locks.note: Without locked strategy-positioning, every operator pivot is unprovable in audit. With sha256-of-canonical-text + set_date, every lock becomes legally-discoverable evidence of when the call was made.

12_truth_ephemeral.name: Truth-ephemeral · the #1 moat (cannot be backfilled)
12_truth_ephemeral.description: Files capturing observations that no competitor on day N+365 can ever reconstruct from public sources · orderbook book-state at trade-time (60s snapshotter window) · forward-witnessed audit timestamps (their git history doesn't include our day-N commits) · J11/J12 feature observables · trade-chain records · per operator-locked v60cq.
12_truth_ephemeral.m_axis: M1 forward-witnessed (the structural moat) + M2 (only-neutral-seat capable of these captures)
12_truth_ephemeral.shipped: v60cq · 2026-05-10 mid-PM (operator: "the trick is the most important moat is some truth that cannot be backfilled")
12_truth_ephemeral.note: A competitor arriving on day N+365 with infinite compute and access to every public source CAN re-derive our truth_permanent files (Polymarket Subgraph · Polygon RPC · UMA chain) but CANNOT reconstruct our truth_ephemeral captures · this is the structural-moat differential.

13_per_market_entity_risk.name: Per-market entity-risk scores (insider + sybil + hedge aggregation)
13_per_market_entity_risk.description: Aggregates hedge_cluster + sybil + insider-overlap per polymarket condition_id (audit_ledger as wallet × market index). MIN_OBSERVATIONS=3 sample-size guard prevents single-wallet markets from being graded HIGH_RISK on coincidence. The AML/Compliance core artifact (Role 8 $25-100K Watchtower).
13_per_market_entity_risk.m_axis: M2 (only-neutral-seat · affiliate competitors structurally cannot publish per-market entity risk against own venue) + M5 (methodology v0.1 version-locked · v0.2 upgrade path documented in script docstring)
13_per_market_entity_risk.shipped: v60dy · 2026-05-11 late HKT (insider-overlap + per-market entity scores) · v60eb · 2026-05-11 late HKT (Board 6 component #13 · TOP RULE -4 auto-flow)
13_per_market_entity_risk.note: Path-A-INDEPENDENT v0.1 · ships on existing audit_ledger + hedge_cluster_score + sybil_clusters inputs. v0.2 (post Path A fill) blends counterparty graph proximity into the scoring · same doctrine + same output schema · methodology version bumps but downstream consumers unchanged.

11_ledger_manifest.name: Public ledger manifest
11_ledger_manifest.description: Self-describing daily inventory of every public-ledger file · sha256 + rows + role per file · engine_sha cross-ref · OTS-anchor cross-ref · the receipt-surface for the receipt-surface itself · v60cm · double-anchored (manifest itself OTS-stamped separately from engine digest)
11_ledger_manifest.m_axis: M4 (reproducibility-from-clone made provable in one read) + M1 (forward-witnessed inventory · double-anchored as of v60cm)
11_ledger_manifest.shipped: v60ce · 2026-05-10 (Rec 2 from public-ledger Frame 3+4 alignment audit) · v60cm · 2026-05-10 mid-PM (double-anchor pattern)
11_ledger_manifest.note: Without the manifest, M4 is "anyone can clone our public ledger and re-derive". With it, M4 becomes "anyone can clone, re-derive, AND verify what they re-derived against today's sha256/row inventory" — a measurably harder bar. v60cm: manifest now has its OWN Bitcoin receipt (separate from the 9-engine-file digest) so the manifest hash itself is provably stamped.
